mapper.select: SELECT empno, ename, sal, deptno, comm, job, mgr, hiredate FROM emp ORDER BY ename
SELECT empno, ename, sal, deptno, comm, job, mgr, hiredate FROM emp WHERE empno = #{empno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp ( empno, ename, mgr, hiredate, job, sal, comm, deptno ) VALUES ( #{empno}, #{ename}, #{mgr}, TO_DATE(#{hiredate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{job}, #{sal}, #{comm}, #{deptno} )
mapper.update: UPDATE emp SET ename = #{ename}, job = #{job}, mgr = #{mgr}, hiredate = TO_DATE(#{hiredate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), sal = #{sal}, comm = #{comm}, deptno = #{deptno} WHERE empno = #{empno}
